response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS — aligning with core requirements — but his title and seniority (Staff/Senior roles since 2014) vastly exceed the junior/mid-level scope, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and potential misalignment with team structure; his German language skill is basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from frontend to infrastructure (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes)
Active open-source contributions and deep architectural thinking evident in GISCollective and tooling
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role; likely seeking senior responsibilities
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
Extensive history with DLang and niche stacks may indicate preference for non-standard tooling over pragmatic enterprise solutions
